criteria.description: Maintainer pubkeys are seeded into knownPeers on mount so the walled-garden purge never removes them as strangers
criteria.notes: useEffect with [] dep array calls rememberKnownPeers(MAINTAINER_PUBKEYS_HEX); placed before migration effect so seeding runs first

criteria.description: Effect runs exactly once on mount (empty dependency array) and is additive only
criteria.notes: Empty dep array guarantees single run; rememberKnownPeers never removes entries per its existing contract
